sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The blue block moved right. Looking at the image, the blue block is now above the right yellow block. Let me check if they're adjacent now.
I've used 54 actions. Let me check the positions and adjacency.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check positions and adjacency
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('b', 'Y'):
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"{n['color']}: row=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}], col=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")

adj = seg['adjacency_list']
print("\nAdjacency (blue/yellow):")
for a in adj:
    i, j = a
    ci = cj = ''
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['id'] == i: ci = n['color']
        if n['id'] == j: cj = n['color']
    if ci in ('b', 'Y') or cj in ('b', 'Y'):
        print(f"  {i}({ci}) -- {j}({cj})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
